sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61216" key="kwqwnoplu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κωθωνο-πλύτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n61216.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who cleans the fish</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κώθων</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
